raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.5": 4,
    "R1.6": 4,
    "RX.1": 2,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.",
    "R1.6": "The text reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one claim (novelty claim), but does not mark confidence or missing evidence for all recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift: the agent provides suggestions outside of the requested paragraph structure.",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.R1.6: The text reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one claim (novelty claim), but does not mark confidence or missing evidence for all recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift: the agent provides suggestions outside of the requested paragraph structure.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced.
